holes.detail: 34 paid devices on subnet; clone an idle one to inherit its session
TCP/22 open to github.com — direct SSH SOCKS
UDP/53 egress open to 8.8.8.8 — iodine/dnscat2 tunnel
UDP/53 egress open to 1.1.1.1 — iodine/dnscat2 tunnel
UDP/123 (NTP) open to pool.ntp.org — covert channel
resolver 172.19.248.1 returns external A records — full recursion = DNS tunnel works
resolver 8.8.8.8 returns external A records — full recursion = DNS tunnel works
resolver 1.1.1.1 returns external A records — full recursion = DNS tunnel works
resolver 9.9.9.9 returns external A records — full recursion = DNS tunnel works
cloudflare-dns.com reachable + answers — DoH tunnel / cloudflared works
ICMP echo reaches the internet — ptunnel-ng covert channel
if quota is per-MAC, a fresh random MAC resets it
